DynaGuard-50.scope: Selective fail-closed mitigation diagnostic. Decisions use guard outputs and matched-neutral metadata; labels are used only for offline evaluation.

neutral_consensus_wrapper_metrics.scope: Offline neutral-consensus selective wrapper. Automatic decisions require unanimous matched-neutral controls; missing or non-unanimous controls abstain.

clean_consensus_wrapper_metrics.scope: Offline neutral-consensus selective wrapper. Automatic decisions require unanimous matched-neutral controls; missing or non-unanimous controls abstain.
